CustomField.description: If scissors should be printed on the boundary lines. Only to be set to true if Boundary Lines is set to true. - https://rest.qr-invoice.cloud/swagger-ui/index.html#/11%20Payment%20Part%20%26%20Receipt%20(QR%20Bill)/createPaymentPartReceipt
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Mark as true if scissors should be printed on the boundary lines. This can only be active if Boundary Lines is active.
CustomField.label: Add Boundary Line Scissors
